reasoning: The fetched FRED series for the 4-week moving average of initial claims (IC4WSA) shows a peak in September at approximately 239k, which has now decreased to 226,750 as of 2025-10-25. Historically and recently, momentum favors a mean-reverting downward trend after such peaks. Examining the same period in the prior year (late October to November), claims saw a consistent decrease from 236k down to roughly 218k-227k. Although the purely linear trend from April through October has a slightly positive slope, the seasonal mean-reversion and recent multi-week momentum suggest a sharp downward correction is underway. Consequently, the probability of the value being higher than the 2025-10-26 baseline by the near-term November dates is below 50%. The uncertainty increases over longer horizons, bringing the January forecast closer to 0.50.
